sections.paragraph:
ἀλεκτρυών, όνος, ὁ a male chicken, cock, rooster (on the formation s. DELG s.v. ἀλέξω Thème II p. 50; since Theognis 864; Cratinus 108, κοκκύζει 311; POxy 1207, 8; Michel 692, 5 [I a.d.]; SIG 1173, 16; 3 Macc 5:23; PGM 3, 693; 701) Gospel Fgm. from the Fayum (Kl. T. 83, p. 23, 10, cp. Mk 14:26–31 and par.).—B. 174.

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Theognis Theognis , VI b.c.—List 5

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Michel Michel = CM., Recueil d’inscriptions grecques—List 3

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Kl. T. Kl. T. = Kleine Texte, ed. HLietzmann, also KAland—List 6

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

par. par. = parallel

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 41
